subcodes.first_line: O divine leaf! Thy letter was received, and thy humility and supplication at the Threshold of the Blessed Beauty—may my spirit be offered up for His loved ones— [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه رحمانیه نامه تو رسید و عجز و نیازت در آستان جمال مبارک روحی لاحبائه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
